ab: Sudu, cnhungi ku madas impicu da, malu su skbarux knan hu?
ch: W:Sudu，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Sudu, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka ka naku uri, na Ayuc ka ingpicu ni.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Ayuc’s.

ab: Kbrxi mu tnayis han haw? Uxay misu biyaw tbrnahun muway dungan.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Iyaq, dsi.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Mhuway su balay, dyawi ku rmngaw ka Ayuc uri.
en: Thank you and thank Ayuc for me.

ab: Manu ka sntangan su hu?
en: May I help you?

ab: Tbrnahun mu muway ka dha patas ni.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Iyaq, manu dungan ka sntangan su nina hu?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Mpkbarux ku turu patas ni.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Kiya ha. Iya chungi mkturu diyax daw yahi tbrinah muway dungan.
ch: W:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ini su tbrnahi muway knan ka ssurus nina.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Tna misu tbrnahun muway ciwa da.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Ma wada uka ka ssurus mu da.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Ya su wada kbrxan Trmi da.
en: Did you lend it to Trmi?

ab: Ini ku kla. Hayi mu smiling ka hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Kbrxi misu ka ssurus mu han.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Sawa, knbrxan su na Ukan ka pnlkusan su lukus jyanba ni hu?
en: Sawa, did Ukan lend you this coat?

ab: Uxay, bnari ku na bubu mu ka ni.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Mntna nisu ka lukus jyangba na Ukan.
en: Ukan’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Mqalux ka lukus jyangba niya, ini pntna rakaw nami.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Kumu, knbarux su hbangan Pawan hu?
en: Kumu, did you borrow money from Pawan?

ab: Niqan, ida mu tbrnahun muway saya, wada ku cnhungi madas pila da.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Tbrnahun su muway knuwan?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Tbrnahun mu muway kusun ka hiya.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Iyaq, dyaun misu rmngaw ka Pawan.
en: Okay, I will tell Pawan for you.
